name: securevault
description: Educational secure vault demo: vulnerable vs fixed builds with automated security tests

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client "npm run start -w server" "npm run preview -w client"
scripts.test: cross-env VULNERABLE_MODE=false npm run test:api -w server && cross-env VULNERABLE_MODE=false playwright test
